title: Add regression test for worktree creation when peer session holds worker lock

tasks.title: Add GH#35 regression test to project-workflow-helper.test.ts: no local worker + peer holds worker.lock + fresh server-side pollers + recovery:once → workflow-backed, no restart attempted
tasks.implementation_summary: Added GH#35 regression test block (2 tests) to project-workflow-helper.test.ts. Tests verify: no local worker + peer holds worker.lock + active server-side pollers + recovery:once → workflow-backed without restart attempt. Both fresh and stale poller scenarios covered.

proposal.notes: Test-only change. GH#35 regression — verify worktree creation succeeds when peer holds worker lock with active server-side pollers.

discovery.notes: Gap: GH#34 tests verify poller probe at getBoundedProjectWorkflowAccess level but don't explicitly test the recovery:once + pollers-active combination (the exact #35 scenario). Adding targeted regression test.

design.notes: Test-only. Add GH#35 describe block to project-workflow-helper.test.ts. One test: recovery:once + no local worker + fresh server pollers → workflow-backed, no restart attempted.

planning.notes: Single task: add regression test. Test-only change.

execution.notes: Task done. 2 regression tests added, all 16 tests in file pass.

acceptance.notes: Test-only change. 2 new tests in project-workflow-helper.test.ts. All 16 tests pass. No production code changes. Pre-existing failures in plugin-init.test.ts unrelated.

release.notes: Test-only. Clean tree, no uncommitted changes. Archived.
